---
title: "Annual Polypharmacy Descriptive Analysis"
author: "Nemo Zhou"
date: "2026-07-05"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  polypharmacy_output_dir: null
---

<!--
Project: Frailty_Komoto annual polypharmacy descriptive visualization
Author: Nemo Zhou
Date started: 2026-07-04
Date last updated: 2026-07-05

Purpose:
This R Markdown report visualizes aggregate annual polypharmacy outputs created
by Code/5.6_check_annual_polypharmacy_metrics.R and
Code/5.8_describe_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence.R. It does not connect to
Redshift. It reads aggregate CSV files from the project-root Outputs folder and
renders annual polypharmacy summaries, a Table 1 by polypharmacy status,
prescription-insurance prevalence, and selected ATC3 class prevalence.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)

library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
```

```{r helpers}
if (!is.null(params$polypharmacy_output_dir) && nzchar(params$polypharmacy_output_dir)) {
  output_dir <- params$polypharmacy_output_dir
} else {
  output_dir_candidates <- c("Outputs", "../Outputs")
  output_dir <- output_dir_candidates[dir.exists(output_dir_candidates)][1]
}

if (is.null(output_dir) || is.na(output_dir) || !dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  stop(
    "Could not find the polypharmacy output directory. Run Code/5.6 and ",
    "Code/5.8 first."
  )
}

read_required_csv <- function(file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Missing required file: ", path, ". Run Code/5.6 and Code/5.8 first.")
  }

  utils::read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

comma_label <- function(x) {
  format(round(as.numeric(x)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
}

percent_label <- function(x) {
  value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  ifelse(is.na(value), NA_character_, paste0(sprintf("%.1f", 100 * value), "%"))
}

percent_label_from_pct <- function(x) {
  value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  ifelse(is.na(value), NA_character_, paste0(sprintf("%.1f", value), "%"))
}

format_n_header <- function(label, n) {
  paste0(label, " (N=", comma_label(n), ")")
}

table_one_variable_labels <- c(
  age_group = "Age group",
  sex = "Sex",
  race_ethnicity = "Race/ethnicity",
  mx_insurance_group = "Mx insurance group",
  mx_insurance_segment = "Mx insurance segment",
  rx_insurance_group = "Rx insurance group",
  rx_insurance_segment = "Rx insurance segment"
)

table_one_variable_order <- c(
  "Age group",
  "Sex",
  "Race/ethnicity",
  "Mx insurance group",
  "Mx insurance segment",
  "Rx insurance group",
  "Rx insurance segment",
  "Overall"
)

format_table_one_display <- function(
  data,
  group_column,
  denominator_column,
  percent_column,
  group_labels
) {
  data$variable <- table_one_variable_labels[data$variable]
  data$group_label <- group_labels[data[[group_column]]]
  data$cell <- percent_label(data[[percent_column]])
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$variable) & !is.na(data$group_label),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  denominators <- unique(data[
    ,
    c("analysis_year", "group_label", denominator_column),
    drop = FALSE
  ])
  names(denominators)[names(denominators) == denominator_column] <- "denominator"

  overall_rows <- denominators
  overall_rows$variable <- "Overall"
  overall_rows$category <- "Overall"
  overall_rows$cell <- "100.0%"

  display_data <- rbind(
    data[, c("analysis_year", "variable", "category", "group_label", "cell")],
    overall_rows[, c("analysis_year", "variable", "category", "group_label", "cell")]
  )
  names(display_data)[names(display_data) == "category"] <- "level"

  output_tables <- list()
  for (analysis_year in unique(display_data$analysis_year)) {
    year_data <- display_data[
      display_data$analysis_year == analysis_year,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    year_denominators <- denominators[
      denominators$analysis_year == analysis_year,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]

    levels <- unique(year_data[, c("variable", "level"), drop = FALSE])
    levels$variable_order <- match(levels$variable, table_one_variable_order)
    levels$level_order <- seq_len(nrow(levels))

    rows <- list()
    for (row_index in seq_len(nrow(levels))) {
      base_row <- levels[row_index, , drop = FALSE]
      output_row <- data.frame(
        variable = base_row$variable,
        level = base_row$level,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      for (group_label in unname(group_labels)) {
        header <- format_n_header(
          group_label,
          year_denominators$denominator[
            year_denominators$group_label == group_label
          ][1]
        )
        matching_cell <- year_data$cell[
          year_data$variable == base_row$variable &
            year_data$level == base_row$level &
            year_data$group_label == group_label
        ]
        output_row[[header]] <- if (length(matching_cell) == 0L) {
          NA_character_
        } else {
          matching_cell[[1]]
        }
      }

      rows[[length(rows) + 1L]] <- output_row
    }

    table <- do.call(rbind, rows)
    table$variable_order <- match(table$variable, table_one_variable_order)
    table$level_order <- seq_len(nrow(table))
    table <- table[
      order(table$variable_order, table$level_order),
      setdiff(names(table), c("variable_order", "level_order")),
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    output_tables[[as.character(analysis_year)]] <- table
  }

  output_tables
}

print_table_one <- function(tables) {
  for (analysis_year in names(tables)) {
    if (length(tables) > 1L) {
      cat("\n\n### ", analysis_year, "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat(knitr::kable(tables[[analysis_year]], row.names = FALSE), sep = "\n")
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}

plot_insurance_prevalence <- function(data) {
  data$prevalence_pct <- as.numeric(data$prevalence_pct)
  data$n_patient_years <- as.numeric(data$n_patient_years)
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$prevalence_pct) & !is.na(data$n_patient_years),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  data$insurance_label <- paste(
    data$rx_insurance_group,
    data$rx_insurance_segment,
    sep = " / "
  )
  data$insurance_label <- stats::reorder(data$insurance_label, data$prevalence_pct)

  ggplot(data, aes(x = insurance_label, y = prevalence_pct)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#3F7C85", width = 0.6) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~ analysis_year, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
    labs(
      title = "Polypharmacy prevalence by prescription insurance",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Prevalence"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

plot_distinct_atc3_distribution <- function(data) {
  data$n_distinct_atc3 <- as.numeric(data$n_distinct_atc3)
  data$n_patients <- as.numeric(data$n_patients)
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$n_distinct_atc3) & !is.na(data$n_patients),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  ggplot(data, aes(x = n_distinct_atc3, y = n_patients)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#6A4C93", width = 0.85) +
    facet_wrap(~ analysis_year, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) comma_label(x)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty) +
    labs(
      title = "Distinct ATC3 medication classes per patient",
      x = "Number of distinct ATC3 classes",
      y = "Patients"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

plot_atc3_prevalence <- function(data) {
  data$prevalence_pct <- as.numeric(data$prevalence_pct)
  data$n_patient_years_with_atc3 <- as.numeric(data$n_patient_years_with_atc3)
  if (!"atc3_rank" %in% names(data)) {
    data$atc3_rank <- NA_integer_
  }
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$prevalence_pct) & !is.na(data$n_patient_years_with_atc3),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  data <- data[
    order(data$analysis_year, data$atc3_rank, -data$n_patient_years_with_atc3),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  data$atc3_plot_label <- paste0(data$atc3, " - ", data$atc3_label)
  data$atc3_plot_label <- factor(
    data$atc3_plot_label,
    levels = rev(unique(data$atc3_plot_label))
  )

  ggplot(data, aes(x = atc3_plot_label, y = prevalence_pct)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#A44A3F", width = 0.65) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~ analysis_year, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
    labs(
      title = "Top 20 ATC3 classes by prevalence",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Prevalence"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

key_atc3_labels <- c(
  A01A = "Stomatological preparations",
  A02B = "Acid-related disorder drugs",
  A07E = "Intestinal antiinflammatory agents",
  A10B = "Blood-glucose-lowering drugs excluding insulin",
  B01A = "Antithrombotic agents",
  C05A = "Agents for treatment of hemorrhoids and anal fissures for topical use",
  C07A = "Beta-blocking agents",
  C09A = "ACE inhibitors, plain",
  C09C = "Angiotensin II receptor blockers, plain",
  C10A = "Lipid-modifying agents, plain",
  D01A = "Antifungals for topical use",
  D02A = "Emollients and protectives",
  D04A = "Antipruritics, including antihistamines and anesthetics",
  D06A = "Antibiotics for topical use",
  D07A = "Corticosteroids, plain",
  H02A = "Corticosteroids for systemic use, plain",
  J01C = "Beta-lactam antibacterials, penicillins",
  J01D = "Other beta-lactam antibacterials",
  J01F = "Macrolides, lincosamides and streptogramins",
  J01M = "Quinolone antibacterials",
  M01A = "Anti-inflammatory and antirheumatic products, non-steroids",
  M03B = "Muscle relaxants, centrally acting agents",
  N02A = "Opioids",
  N02B = "Other analgesics and antipyretics",
  N03A = "Antiepileptics",
  N05A = "Antipsychotics",
  N05B = "Anxiolytics",
  N05C = "Hypnotics and sedatives",
  N06A = "Antidepressants",
  R01A = "Decongestants and other nasal preparations for topical use",
  R03A = "Adrenergics, inhalants",
  R03B = "Other drugs for obstructive airway diseases, inhalants",
  R05D = "Cough suppressants, excluding combinations with expectorants",
  S01A = "Antiinfectives",
  S01B = "Antiinflammatory agents",
  S01E = "Antiglaucoma preparations and miotics",
  S01X = "Other ophthalmologicals"
)

add_atc3_labels <- function(data) {
  if (!"atc3_label" %in% names(data)) {
    data$atc3_label <- unname(key_atc3_labels[data$atc3])
  }
  data$atc3_label[is.na(data$atc3_label) | data$atc3_label == ""] <-
    unname(key_atc3_labels[data$atc3[is.na(data$atc3_label) | data$atc3_label == ""]])
  data$atc3_label[is.na(data$atc3_label) | data$atc3_label == ""] <-
    paste0(data$atc3[is.na(data$atc3_label) | data$atc3_label == ""], " (ATC3 name not mapped)")
  data
}
```

```{r read-data}
annual_summary <- read_required_csv("5.6_annual_polypharmacy_summary.csv")
insurance_prevalence <- read_required_csv(
  "5.6_annual_polypharmacy_prevalence_by_rx_insurance.csv"
)
table_one_polypharmacy <- read_required_csv(
  "5.6_table_one_by_polypharmacy_categorical.csv"
)
distinct_atc3_distribution <- read_required_csv(
  "5.6_distinct_atc3_distribution.csv"
)
atc3_prevalence <- add_atc3_labels(
  read_required_csv("5.8_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence.csv")
)
```

# Annual Polypharmacy

## Summary

```{r annual-summary-table, results='asis'}
annual_summary_display <- data.frame(
  `Analysis year` = annual_summary$analysis_year,
  `Eligible patients` = comma_label(annual_summary$n_eligible_patient_years),
  `Patients with polypharmacy` = comma_label(annual_summary$n_polypharmacy),
  `Polypharmacy prevalence` = percent_label_from_pct(annual_summary$prevalence_pct),
  `Mean days with >=5 ATC3 classes` = sprintf(
    "%.1f",
    as.numeric(annual_summary$mean_total_days_5plus)
  ),
  check.names = FALSE
)
cat(knitr::kable(annual_summary_display, row.names = FALSE), sep = "\n")
```

## Table 1

```{r polypharmacy-table-one, results='asis'}
print_table_one(format_table_one_display(
  table_one_polypharmacy,
  group_column = "polypharmacy_group",
  denominator_column = "polypharmacy_denominator",
  percent_column = "percent_within_polypharmacy_group",
  group_labels = c(
    "Without polypharmacy" = "Without polypharmacy",
    "With polypharmacy" = "With polypharmacy"
  )
))
```

# Medication Class Count

```{r distinct-atc3-distribution-plot}
plot_distinct_atc3_distribution(distinct_atc3_distribution)
```

# Prescription Insurance

```{r insurance-prevalence-plot}
plot_insurance_prevalence(insurance_prevalence)
```

# Top 20 ATC3 Class Prevalence

```{r atc3-prevalence-plot, fig.width=11, fig.height=7}
plot_atc3_prevalence(atc3_prevalence)
```
